tutors.name: Élise Morel
tutors.headline: Maths · MPSI / MP*
tutors.bio: Normalienne (ENS Paris-Saclay), 6 years of experience with prépa students. Specialised in oral-style written answers and admission contests.

tutors.name: Antoine Rousseau
tutors.headline: Physics · Terminale → Prépa
tutors.bio: PhD candidate in theoretical physics. Patient, methodical, and unusually clear on thermodynamics and electromagnetism.

tutors.name: Sophie Nguyen
tutors.headline: Maths & Physics · Lycée
tutors.bio: Agrégée de maths, 8 years of experience with high-school and prépa students. Strong on Bac speciality and Parcoursup preparation.

Homepage.pathsTitle: Four tracks, one standard of rigour.
Homepage.pathsIntro: High school, prépa, BTS, bachelor's: every track has its own programme, its own exercises, and tutors who know the exam expectations. Pick yours, the rest follows.
Homepage.methodIntro: Three simple building blocks, designed to help you make real progress without drowning in content.
Homepage.benefitsTitle: Everything you need, nothing you don't.
Homepage.benefitsIntro: Six reasons students and parents choose Intégrale over a one-off tutor or a content library.

benefits.title: Verified tutors
benefits.body: Profiles are screened on application, pedagogical interview, and a live teaching demo. Only the strongest make it onto the platform.

benefits.title: Vetted curricula
benefits.body: Every programme is mapped to a real exam: Bac, prépa rank, BTS assessment, or university module. No generic content.

benefits.title: Book in 60 seconds
benefits.body: Pick a course, a slot, pay — calendar invite and Zoom link arrive by email. Reschedule or cancel from your dashboard.

benefits.title: Frictionless video
benefits.body: A private Zoom room per session. No install, screen-share and white-board included. Mobile, tablet, laptop — same experience.

benefits.title: Honest pricing
benefits.body: Stripe Checkout, Apple Pay, Google Pay, SEPA. Receipt and invoice emailed automatically. No hidden fees, no subscriptions.

benefits.title: Real progress
benefits.body: A dashboard that surfaces the topics you actually struggle with, session after session. Less guesswork, more progress.

Homepage.howTitle: From sign-up to first session in under five minutes.
Homepage.howIntro: A predictable, no-surprise booking experience. You always know what's next, and what's expected of you.

howSteps.title: Tell us about you
howSteps.body: Level, subject, goal — Bac, prépa rank, or a university module. We use this to point you to the right tutor.

howSteps.title: Pick a tutor & a slot
howSteps.body: Browse verified profiles and book a slot that fits your week. Real availability, no back-and-forth emails.

howSteps.title: Pay, securely
howSteps.body: Stripe Checkout, card or Apple Pay. Receipt and invoice sent automatically. Your first slot is on us.

howSteps.title: Meet on Zoom
howSteps.body: Calendar invite and Zoom link land in your inbox 24 h before, then 1 h before. Join from any device.

Homepage.testimonialsIntro: Real outcomes from real sessions. A few of the messages we get after a term of work.

testimonials.quote: In two months of sessions I gained 4 points of average in maths. The reminders before each session save me from forgetting.
testimonials.author: Léa B.

testimonials.quote: The interface is clean, the tutor knows the MPSI programme inside out. I recommend it for any prépa student.
testimonials.author: Mehdi R.

testimonials.quote: Payment and automatic invoicing — nothing to manage. My parents get a monthly recap without asking.
testimonials.author: Camille V.

Homepage.ctaDescription: A 20-minute exchange to map your needs, then a free slot with a verified tutor.
Homepage.faqIntro: The questions we get most often. If yours isn't here, drop us a line — we usually reply within 24 hours.
Homepage.faqContact: Can't find your answer? Write to us at

faqItems.q: How does the first free session work?
faqItems.a: It's a 20-minute call with a tutor: we map your level, your goal, and your timeframe, then we propose a programme. If we can't help, we tell you — and we point you to the right resource.

faqItems.q: Can I cancel or reschedule a session?
faqItems.a: Yes, from your dashboard, up to 1 hour before the start. After that, the session is due. We track every change so there's no surprise charge.
Three filters: a written application, a 30-minute pedagogical interview, and a live teaching demo. We turn down most applicants — the average tutor has 6+ years of experience.

faqItems.q: What if I don't connect with my tutor?
faqItems.a: Tell us. We'll switch you to another tutor at no cost, no question asked. The tutor-student fit matters more than any other variable.

faqItems.q: Do you offer invoices and receipts?
faqItems.a: Yes — Stripe sends a receipt at payment, an invoice is sent at the end of the month, and your dashboard keeps a full history exportable as PDF.

faqItems.q: Which subjects and levels are covered?
faqItems.a: Mathematics, physics and chemistry, from high school (Seconde → Terminale) through classes préparatoires (MPSI / MP / PC / PSI) and bachelor's (L1 / L2 Sciences).

steps.title: Live video courses
steps.body: 45 to 60-minute sessions with a tutor, in small groups or one-to-one — ask your questions in real time.

steps.title: Step-by-step corrections
steps.body: Every correction walks through the reasoning, not just the final result.

steps.title: Progress tracking
steps.body: A dashboard that surfaces your real weak points, session after session.

About.title: About — Intégrale
About.description: Intégrale is an online tutoring platform in mathematics and physics-chemistry, from high school to undergraduate.
About.h1: One conviction: the quality of an explanation changes everything.
About.body1: Intégrale was founded in Paris in 2026 from a simple observation: students who succeed in science are not the ones who put in the most hours, they are the ones who had a good tutor, at the right moment. Our job is to put those tutors in front of every student, on video, at the right moment.
About.body2: Mathematics, physics, chemistry — from high school to bachelor's. No miracle promises, no pre-baked content. One tutor, one student, one programme, and the rigour it takes.

values.title: Understand, not just memorise
values.body: Our tutors are hired on their ability to make an idea land, not on a ranking. A good answer is not enough — a good explanation is required.

values.title: Maths and physics, taken seriously
values.body: No miracle promises. A programme aligned with high-school and prépa expectations, calibrated exercises, written corrections.

values.title: Transparency, by default
values.body: Clear per-session pricing, real slots, invoices sent. No hidden subscription, no opaque commission, no surprises.

About.bandDescription: A 20-minute chat to scope your needs, then a free slot with a verified tutor.

Levels.h1: Four tracks, one standard of rigour.
Levels.intro: High school, classes préparatoires, BTS, bachelor's: every track has its own programme, its own exercises, and tutors who know the exam expectations. Pick yours, the rest follows.
Levels.ctaDescription: Get in touch — we will point you to the right track and the right tutor, no commitment.

Pricing.title: Pricing — Intégrale
Pricing.description: Three plans: pay-as-you-go, 5-session pack, continuous mentoring. Clear pricing, automatic billing, receipt by email.
Pricing.intro: Pick the plan that matches your need. No hidden commitment, automatic billing, receipt sent by email.

faqItems.a: Yes, up to 1 hour before the start. Beyond that, the session is due.
Stripe Checkout, secured (Apple Pay, Google Pay, card, SEPA). You receive a receipt and an invoice automatically.

faqItems.q: Does the price include the resources?
faqItems.a: Yes, the materials shared by the tutor are accessible for free for the full duration of the follow-up.
